nasb.text: So they said, “Behold, there is a feast of the Lord from year to year in Shiloh, which is on the north side of Bethel, on the east side of the highway that goes up from Bethel to Shechem, and on the south side of Lebonah.”

esv.text: So they said, “Behold, there is the yearly feast of the Lord at Shiloh, which is north of Bethel, on the east of the highway that goes up from Bethel to Shechem, and south of Lebonah.”

cnv.text: 他們又說：“看哪，每年在示羅都舉行耶和華的節期；示羅就是在伯特利的北面，從伯特利上示劍的大路的東面，在利波拿的南面。”

ccb.text: 有人想起在示罗每年都有耶和华的节期。示罗在利波拿以南、伯特利以北至示剑的大路东面。
